description: A parent company needs to consolidate the financial results of a wholly-owned subsidiary into its own financial statements.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the final trial balances for both the parent company and the subsidiary.
Identify and prepare the necessary elimination entries for intercompany transactions (e.g., loans, sales).

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares all required elimination entries.

nodes.task_description: Combine the trial balances and post the elimination entries to produce a consolidated trial balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the consolidated trial balance.
